slots: flat / the city center, house / the university
example: I live in a flat near the city center.

slots: my bedroom / it's cozy, the living room / it has a great view
example: My favorite room is my bedroom because it's cozy.

pattern: My hometown is a ___ city in ___.
slots: small / southern China, coastal / Japan
example: My hometown is a small city in southern China.

slots: its food / scenery, its history / culture
example: It's famous for its food and scenery.

slots: Business / Beijing University, Computer Science / MIT
example: I'm studying Computer Science at Beijing University.

slots: software engineer / a tech company, teacher / an international school
example: I work as a software engineer for a tech company.

pattern: I got into ___ when I was ___.
slots: photography / 15, painting / in high school

slots: a small town in Yunnan, a coastal city in Spain

pattern: It's located in ___ and is known for ___.
slots: the mountains / its scenery, the city center / its night markets
example: It's located in the mountains and is known for its scenery.

slots: the view is amazing, it's not too touristy
example: I would recommend it because the view is amazing.

slots: this area / the atmosphere, this city / the mix of old and new
example: What makes this area special is the vibrant atmosphere.

slots: the National Stadium, the local sports center
example: I've been to the National Stadium several times.

slots: the match was on / electric, I was there / incredible
example: The atmosphere when the match was on was electric.

pattern: A new shop has recently opened ___.
slots: near my house, in the city center
example: A new shop has recently opened near my house.

slots: organic food, handmade crafts, second-hand books
example: It specializes in organic food.

slots: economic benefits / harms the environment
example: While tourism brings economic benefits, it also harms the environment.

pattern: One way to solve this is ___.
slots: to limit visitor numbers, to promote eco-tourism
example: One way to solve this is to limit visitor numbers.

slots: communicate, work, shop
example: Technology has changed how we communicate.

pattern: On the one hand ___. On the other hand ___.
slots: it's convenient / it's distracting, it saves time / it reduces face-to-face interaction
example: On the one hand it's convenient. On the other hand it's distracting.

pattern: When choosing a job, people value ___ over ___.
slots: salary / passion, stability / growth
example: When choosing a job, people value stability over growth.
